entities.name: VEGETABLE LEGUMES
entities.description: Underexploited legumes used as vegetables that serve as sources of nutrients and bioactive chemicals

entities.name: CARBOHYDRATES
entities.description: Essential nutrients provided by vegetable legumes

entities.name: VITAMINS
entities.description: Essential nutrients provided by vegetable legumes

entities.name: MINERALS
entities.description: Essential nutrients provided by vegetable legumes

entities.name: BIOACTIVE CHEMICALS
entities.description: Health-promoting chemicals found in vegetable legumes

entities.name: OPTIMUM YIELDS
entities.description: The desired level of production for vegetable legumes to ensure sustainability

entities.name: FOOD AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The state of having sufficient food for the population, supported by underexploited legumes

entities.name: ACCESSIBILITY
entities.description: The ability of people to obtain food, supported by underexploited legumes

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD UTILIZATION
entities.description: The use of crops to improve economic and living conditions

entities.name: PULSE LEGUMES
entities.description: Legumes primarily used as pulses, which have historically received more research attention than vegetable legumes

entities.name: DEVELOPING NATIONS
entities.description: Regions where malnutrition exists and underexploited legumes are a potential nutritional source

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A deficiency or excess of nutrient intake prevalent in developing nations

entities.name: VEGETABLE PIGEON PEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan, an underexploited vegetable legume

entities.name: CLUSTER BEAN
entities.description: Cyamopsis tetragonoloba, an underexploited vegetable legume

entities.name: WINGED BEAN
entities.description: Psophocarpus tetragonolobus, an underexploited vegetable legume

entities.name: DOLICHOS BEAN
entities.description: Lablab purpureus, an underexploited vegetable legume

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: Vigna unguiculata, an underexploited vegetable legume

entities.name: PRE-BREEDING
entities.description: An early stage of crop improvement to introduce new genetic diversity into vegetable legumes

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify specific locations on a chromosome for breeding vegetable legumes

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCUS
entities.description: Regions of DNA associated with a particular phenotypic trait in vegetable legumes

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism applied to vegetable legume breeding

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: The direct manipulation of an organism's genes to improve vegetable legumes

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food
